InitCmd.key: Init7\IO: Set State TComObj PREOP OP
Init8\IO: Set State TComObj SAFEOP OP

InitCmd.message: Create EtherCAT SyncUnit XPlanar Task_5 (set to PREOP)
Create Object Untitled1 Instance - Device 1 (TC3 EIP Adapter)
Create Object XPlanar MC Project MET 0 - Untitled1 Instance
Enable online change 'Untitled1 Instance - Device 1 (TC3 EIP Adapter)'
Enable online change 'XPlanar MC Project MET 0 - Untitled1 Instance'
EtherCAT SyncUnit XPlanar Task_5 (set to SAFEOP)
Device Device 1 (TC3 EIP Adapter) opened (set to SAFEOP)
Set Object XPlanar MC Project:Context1 to SAFEOP

InitCmd.key: Init15\IO: Set State TComObj PREOP OP
InitCmd.message: Device Device 1 (TC3 EIP Adapter) opened (set to OP)
